name: memsearch
description: A Markdown-first semantic memory library for AI agents backed by Milvus/Zilliz vector search. Ships a Claude Code plugin with hooks for automatic session memory capture and a memory-recall SKILL.md. Published on PyPI. From Zilliz (makers of Milvus).

dangerous_patterns: session-start.sh installs uv via curl pipe to sh if not present (curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh)
findings_summary.notes: From Zilliz, a legitimate company behind the Milvus vector database. The ccplugin includes four hooks: SessionStart (injects memory hint + optionally installs uv), UserPromptSubmit (lightweight hint — outputs a systemMessage only), Stop (parses transcript with 'claude -p', saves to memory), and SessionEnd. The Stop hook reads the transcript file and summarizes it using Claude CLI — this is a standard pattern. The curl-pipe-to-sh pattern in session-start.sh for uv installation is a minor concern (common practice but downloads+executes code). The memory-recall SKILL.md is clean. No data exfiltration: memories stay local or in user-configured Milvus instance. MIT license, published Python package on PyPI, full documentation site. Score slightly reduced for the curl install pattern and no security policy.
